languages.text: "Мне надоело терпеть твои выходки. Иди куда хочешь, но уже без меня".
"I have had enough of your antics. Go wherever you wish, but I will not be joining you."
languages.original_text: "Мне надоело терпеть твои выходки. Иди куда хочешь, но уже без меня".

traits.locale_text: "I have had enough of your antics. Go wherever you wish, but I will not be joining you."
"I have had enough of your antics. Go wherever you wish, but I will not be joining you."
"I have had enough of your antics. Go wherever you wish, but I will not be joining you."

languages.text: «Me he cansado de sus tonterías. Vaya donde quiera, pero no le acompañaré».
languages.original_text: "I have had enough of your antics. Go wherever you wish, but I will not be joining you."

traits.locale_text: «Me he cansado de sus tonterías. Vaya donde quiera, pero no le acompañaré».

languages.text: “我受够你的把戏了。你想去哪就去哪，但我恕不奉陪。”
languages.original_text: "I have had enough of your antics. Go wherever you wish, but I will not be joining you."

traits.locale_text: “我受够你的把戏了。你想去哪就去哪，但我恕不奉陪。”

languages.text: « J'en ai assez de vos frasques. Allez où vous voulez, mais je ne vous accompagnerai pas. »
languages.original_text: "I have had enough of your antics. Go wherever you wish, but I will not be joining you."

traits.locale_text: « J'en ai assez de vos frasques. Allez où vous voulez, mais je ne vous accompagnerai pas. »

languages.text: "Maskaralıklarından bıktım. Nereye istersen git, ben gelmiyorum."
languages.original_text: "I have had enough of your antics. Go wherever you wish, but I will not be joining you."

traits.locale_text: "Maskaralıklarından bıktım. Nereye istersen git, ben gelmiyorum."

languages.text: "Ich habe genug von Euren Spielchen. Geht wohin Ihr wollt, aber ohne mich."
languages.original_text: "I have had enough of your antics. Go wherever you wish, but I will not be joining you."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe genug von Euren Spielchen. Geht wohin Ihr wollt, aber ohne mich."

languages.text: 「おふざけはもうたくさんだ。好きなところへ行きなさい、でも私はあなたたちに加わらない」。
languages.original_text: "I have had enough of your antics. Go wherever you wish, but I will not be joining you."
